name: Onboarding Milestone Tracker
description: Tracks customer onboarding progress and sends proactive nudges when milestones are at risk of slipping.
longDescription: Monitors onboarding milestones against your defined timeline. When a customer falls behind on key steps (first login, integration setup, training completion, first value moment), it automatically sends personalized nudge emails and alerts the CSM. Includes a weekly onboarding health digest.
